hypothesis_en: Mr President, we welcome and join with emotion the solidarity with the victims of the terrorist attacks of 11 March, expressed by the Council, the Commission and especially by you, Mr President Pat Cox, and the proposal to dedicate that day every year to the memory of the victims of terrorism. As well as the creation of a counter-terrorism officer at European level, they are positive in the fight against terrorism, but we must not fall into the controlling and suspicious hysteria of what the United States has done with the Patriot Act, with the measures that undermine human rights and the foundations of democracy and freedom. We do not agree with the proposals for police control, which involve biometric and similar data. Europe in the world can and must strive to achieve a fairer and more united world, without poverty or inequality, which eliminates all justification, always condemned, for the murderers of democracy and freedom. It would be necessary to hold a global conference under the auspices of the UN against terrorism, where different measures such as police cooperation, structural problems, poverty, debt, inequality, the role of financial institutions and also of the various commercial entities could be expressed. Finally, in relation to the possible and desirable amendment and termination of the European Constitution, which has been opened up from the appointment of Mr Zapatero as candidate for President of the Government of Spain, together with other movements in Europe, we think it would be important to seize this opportunity to, together with the necessary reforms in decision-making, also have More democracy and more solidarity in the European Constitution, with parliamentary control and popular sovereignty over the European Central Bank and a modification of the Stability Pact that implies progress throughout Europe.
reference_en: thank you President (3.55) we received with great e= emotion the solidarity expressed towards the victims of the eleventh of March the Commission the Council (1.42) and the President of the Parliament Mr Pat Cox all expressed their condolences (1.28) and every day every year we will remember the victims of that terrorist attack police coordination information coordination and judicial coordination as well as the creation of a terrorism czar are positive steps forward in the fight against terrorism but we shouldn't fall into a hysterical situation we shouldn't have our society reigned by suspicion (2.13) we should have no measures which remove our human rights (2.52) this is exactly what the terrorists want they want to undermine democracy (2.34) so in that sense we don't agree with the additional measures of police control (1.06) it seems to us that Spain and Europe (2.8) have to= have responded in the right way as the US did after the eleventh of September (1.2) but we cannot invade countries we cannot constrain liberties and freedom we need proper police cooperation so that the criminals may be brought brought to justice the role of Europe in the world (1.72) has to (1.02) be to create a more (1.91) just world without inequalities which removes any justification (1.29) for murder and removal of freedom (1.56) we have to take a different tack from that taken by the US (1.97) we have to e= put an end to the unjust and illegal occupation of Iraq (1.05) that has also created murders we also have to make sure that the Israelis remove themselves from the occupied territories in Palestine we have to work against terrorism with the UN (1.61) this is where we have to take different measures such as cooperation between police forces tackling structural problems debt inequality and poverty the role of financial institutions and also the role of the various trade bodies we have to f= fight against (1.1) money laundering and tax evasion measures which have also been mentioned by Mrs Doyle and finally in relation with the possible and desirable change and winding up of the European Constitution (1.77) now now that Mr Zapatero is likely to be Prime Minister of Spain and because of other shifts in Europe we think it's important to take advantage of this opportunity to undertake reforms in the decision making process but also to have more democracy and solidarity injected into the European Constitution with proper parliamentary control and people's sovereignty over the European Central Bank a change to the Stability Pact which would mean progress throughout the whole of Europe thank you very much President
source_es: muchas gracias señor Presidente con emoción recibimos y nos unimos a la solidaridad con las víctimas de los atentados terroristas del once de e= de marzo expresada por el Consejo la Comisión y especialmente por usted señor Presidente Pat Cox y a la propuesta de dedicar cada año ese día a la memoria de las víctimas del terrorismo asimismo pensamos que las medidas de coordinación policial de información y también judicial así como la creación del responsable contra el terrorismo a escala europea son positivas en la lucha contra el terrorismo pero no debemos caer en la e= en la histeria controladora y de suspicacia de la que ha hecho gala Estados Unidos con la Patriot Act con las medidas que atentan a los derechos humanos y las bases de la democracia y la libertad esa es junto con el terror uno de los objetivos de los terroristas minar la democracia es en ese sentido que estamos de acuerdo que no estamos de acuerdo con las propuestas de control policíaco que suponen datos biométricos y similares nos parece que la respuesta que ha dado España y Europa tan alejada de la que dio Estados Unidos ante el once de septiembre es la adecuada en lugar de inclinarse por la agresividad la reacción militar y la reducción de libertades o invadir países hemos puesto énfasis en la persecución policial para llevar ante la justicia a estos criminales justamente el papel de Europa en el mundo puede y debe encaminarse a conseguir un mundo más justo y solidario sin pobreza ni desigualdades que elimine toda justificación siempre condenable a los asesinos de la democracia y de la libertad entre estas medidas de una orientación totalmente diferente a la estadounidense está la que supone acabar con la ilegal e injusta ocupación de Iraq el reconocimiento del Estado de Palestina para poner fin a otra ilegal ocupación igualmente asesina la de Palestina por las tropas de Israel haría falta ~cereblar una conferencia mundial bajo la égida de la ONU contra el terrorismo donde se puedan expresar las u= suf= las diferentes medidas como la cooperación entre las policías los problemas estructurales pobreza deuda desigualdad el papel de las instituciones financieras y también de las distintas entidades comerciales luchar contra los paraísos fe= fiscales y el bancle= el blanqueo de dinero medidas que también han sido mencionadas por la Señora Doyle y por último en relación con la posible y deseable modificación y terminación de la Constitución Europea que se ha abierto a partir de la designación del Señor Zapatero como candidato para presidente del Gobierno de España junto con otros movimientos en Europa pensamos que sería importante aprovechar esta oportunidad para junto con las reformas necesarias en la toma de decisiones también tener más democracia y más solidaridad en la Constitución Europea con un control parlamentario y de la soberanía popular sobre el Banco Central Europeo y una modificación del Pacto de Estabilidad que suponga progreso en toda Europa muchas gracias señor Presidente
